rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; Iran deal incremental progress offers mild indirect energy cost potential, but no structural change for a western EU peripheral resident.

top_events.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
top_events.summary: Iran's Hormuz reopening signal could indirectly ease EU energy prices if a deal is reached, offering mild potential relief on Portugal's cost of living and energy bills.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT use
top_events.summary: A US lawsuit against OpenAI over AI-linked harm raises broader questions about AI regulation in the EU, with potential indirect policy implications for Portuguese consumers.
